notes: Makes search more forgiving for common names by normalizing punctuation, apostrophes, accents, and spacing before matching.
Expands search fields to include aliases, alternate names, search terms, and nested mushroom-profile common-name aliases where present.
Adds Chicken Fat / Chicken Fat Mushroom / White Pine Bolete / American Slippery Jack aliases to the active Suillus americanus record without changing its edible route.
Completes exact rights metadata for the third visible Suillus americanus Commons image while touching the record.
